description: Checklist d'extraction du squelette viral d'un YouTube Short — basée sur l'ARCHIVUM (MoneyBoyMaxx, Tim Danilov, vidIQ) + recherche web

skeleton_formula.formula: Hook → Explain Payoff → Foreshadow Payoff → Reveal Payoff
skeleton_formula.quote: A video needs two fundamentals: a payoff and a hook. Hooks are for the swipe rate and payoffs are for retention.
skeleton_formula.critical_rule: Structure your entire script around the payoff. The payoff is the anchor, not the hook.

skeleton_elements.description: La première frame qui stoppe le scroll. Doit être visible SANS SON.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote: Someone should see your video even if they can't hear anything. The hook can refer to visually the hook.
skeleton_elements.validation: Si on coupe le son, est-ce que ça stoppe quand même le scroll ?

skeleton_elements.description: Une phrase qui crée un vide cognitif ET set up le payoff. Pas juste viral — doit préparer le payoff.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote: A mid hook that perfectly sets your viewer up for the payoff is better than a great hook that doesn't lay out what the payoff is.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote_2: You can have the most banger video with the craziest payoff, but if the hook isn't there, nobody will watch it to the end.
skeleton_elements.validation: Le hook set-up-t-il le payoff ? Un hook viral sans payoff = inutile.

skeleton_elements.description: Fournir le contexte rapidement après le hook pour intriguer le viewer.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote: Provide context quickly after so the viewer is intrigued.
skeleton_elements.validation: Pas de temps mort entre hook et contexte.

skeleton_elements.timeframe: intégré au hook ou juste après
skeleton_elements.description: Le payoff doit être foreshadowé dès le début — soit dans le hook, soit très rapidement après.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote: The payoff should be foreshadowed in the beginning either in the hook or very quickly after the video started.
skeleton_elements.validation: Le viewer sait-il dès le début ce qu'il va gagner à regarder jusqu'au bout ?

skeleton_elements.archivum_note: Commentary = format le plus accessible pour débutants (MBM). Ranking = deuxième meilleur. AI voiceovers autorisés (11 Labs).

skeleton_elements.description: Chaque seconde = info nouvelle. Pas de sag (baisse de tension). Le script entier est structuré autour du payoff.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote: If the retention sucks, the script or storytelling is bad and it needs to be fixed.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote_2: The whole middle of the script kills retention (exemple d'un mauvais Short).
skeleton_elements.validation: Si la rétention baisse = le script/storytelling est mauvais. Corriger le milieu.

skeleton_elements.description: Le fait dingue final. Le point d'ancrage du script. Tout est construit autour de ça.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote: Structure your entire script around the payoff. The payoff is everything for retention.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote_2: You need to have a good payoff. The only way to even define a good hook is by how well it sets up the payoff.
skeleton_elements.validation: Le payoff répond-il au hook ? Est-il satisfaisant ? Si non, tout le Short échoue.

skeleton_elements.description: La fin reconnecte au début pour forcer le re-regard. Les replays comptent comme des views depuis mars 2025.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote: Make your videos replayable or even loopable. Even a small percent of rewatchers boosts retention significantly.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote_2: Your brain wants to close that gap, close that loop. The only way to stop that is to keep watching.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote_3: By the end, make sure you answer the question that leads back to the beginning.
skeleton_elements.archivum_quote_4: Ties nicely into a loop so people don't even realize they're re-watching the video.
skeleton_elements.best_practice: Combiner 2+ techniques (ex: verbal callback + visual match cut)
skeleton_elements.validation: Le loop est-il naturel ou forcé ? Le viewer réalise-t-il qu'il re-regarde ?

what_does_not_exist_in_shorts.reason: Trop court. Le hook + foreshadow = la promesse. Pas de temps pour rehooks. Le CTA casse le rythme.

metrics_extractible.note: yt-dlp view_count pour Shorts = ~50% du chiffre affiché sur la page (engaged views vs reely views)

metrics_inferrable_par_gemini.method: Gemini regarde la vidéo entière — voit la first frame, entend l'audio, lit le texte overlay, perçoit le pacing

metrics_studio_only.access: YouTube Studio uniquement — PAS via yt-dlp ni YouTube Data API v3
metrics_studio_only.solution: Phase 1: Warsmith remplit performance.json manuellement. Phase 2: CAPTEURS si possible.

outlier_score.critical_rule: NE JAMAIS mixer baseline Long et Shorts
outlier_score.archivum_quote: Start experimenting after you have three videos that crossed your channel's median by 3x (Tim Danilov)

swipe_rate_benchmarks.critical_rule: As the video is getting pushed, swipe rate must be INCREASING or STABLE. If it drops = audience reject.
swipe_rate_benchmarks.archivum_quote: If the video is losing swipe rate as it's getting pushed, this shows YouTube that a larger audience does not want to see this.

monetization.key_metric: Engaged views (pas juste views) — ce qui compte pour le paiement
monetization.requirements: Content must meet advertiser guidelines. Must be transformative.
monetization.reused_content_threat: Doit ajouter narrative, commentary, editing. Pas juste copier-coller.

zero_view_jail.description: YouTube ne push pas le contenu dans le shorts feed. Les views restent à zéro.
zero_view_jail.solution: Compte neuf ou incognito pour tester le feed. Aged Gmails parfois mieux.
zero_view_jail.archivum_quote: Algorithm is the audience, audience is the algorithm. If the audience likes your video, the algorithm likes your video.

ai_slop_threat.description: 33% du feed Shorts est maintenant de l'AI slop. L'algorithme filtre de plus en plus l'AI low quality.
ai_slop_threat.archivum_quote: 33% of the feed is now AI slop. Those 3D videos got messed up with the AI slop filter.
ai_slop_threat.solution: Qualité > quantité. Éviter l'AI low quality. Être transformative.

experimentation_rule.rule: Change ONE variable at a time. If it's a new hook or a new character or a new setup — change one thing so you can quickly kill the bad ideas.
experimentation_rule.trigger: Start experimenting after 3 videos that crossed your channel's median by 3x.

team_structure.archivum_quote: Idea guy finds ideas, script guy writes, animator edits. Founder approves final script and maintains quality.
